name: AREA93
short_description: Survive in Area93 where unidentified life forms exist.
detailed_description:
Unidentified area "AREA93"

You are in the unidentified area "AREA93"
An isolated situation with no one around
Can you escape?

There is something threatening you
The only way to survive here is to follow the notes someone wrote down.
Escape from this place in the dark night to avoid unidentified creatures.

-An enemy that continuously pursues
-The only hint note for escape

- Control movement with the keyboard.
- Find notes and proceed with the game
- Enemies continuously track you
- Run away from enemies and find all notes

Enemies can make unpredictable movements. Always check your surroundings before moving
Notes are hidden everywhere. Look carefully to find them.
The night is too dark. Adapt to limited vision and prepare for crisis.

Hope this helps! Good luck surviving AREA93!
